en: I'll just wait, wait out.
Do you want to read them?
Thank you.
OK, so tonight, you're working.
ko: 좋아, 그럼 오늘 밤 너는 일하는 거야.

en: Are you listening, or did I lose you?
Ben, is she listening? I am totally listening.
ko: 벤, 그녀가 듣고 있어? 나는 완전히 듣고 있어.

en: I ordered some stuff to check on how it arrived.
ko: 어떻게 도착했는지 확인하려고 몇 가지 주문했어.

en: Not great, by the way.
Go on, tonight. Yeah, OK.
You're working, so Paige and I are
going to go to my mom's for dinner after school's Ruby's birthday party.
ko: 학교 끝나고 루비 생일 파티 후에 엄마 집에 저녁 먹으러 갈 거야.

en: And what about next Monday?
Do you know yet if we can go to dinner with Robbie and Annie?
ko: 로비와 애니와 저녁 먹을 수 있는지 아직 알아?

en: Oh, I'm so slammed next week. I'm sorry. If you want to go, I'll make it. When was it?
ko: 아, 다음 주는 너무 바빠. 미안해. 가고 싶으면 내가 맞출게. 언제였지?

en: Oh my god, Monday.
OK, I'm sorry.
I was fixated on this tissue paper.
I will be there.
OK. Thank you for the coffee.
Thanks for letting me play.
Oops. Sorry. I'll meet you in the car.
Actually, I have to go. Come on, sweetie.
ko: 차에서 만날게. 사실, 나 가야 해. 자, 가자, 아가.

en: Remember, we're going to drop Paige at school, OK?
ko: 기억해, 페이지를 학교에 데려다 줄 거야, 알겠지?

en: Here we go. Let's do it. Kiss daddy goodbye.
Mwah.
Hey, wait, you forgot your doggie.
